name: Papo Vázquez
description: '''Angel Rafael "Papo" Vázquez''' is an American trombonist, composer, arranger, and bandleader of Puerto Rican descent who performs and records jazz, Latin and Afro-Caribbean music. He is known as one of the pioneers of the bomba jazz style and is a [[Grammy Awards|Grammy Award]] nominee. [https://www.nyemmys.org/media/files/files/6646e8b6/68th-annual-ny-emmy-awards-nominees-final-press-release-version-8-1-2025-9am.pdf 2024 New York Emmy Awards nominated for Musical Composition/Arrangement National Puerto Rican Day Parade Orchestra BARD Entertainment] [https://www.google.com/search?client=safari&rls=en&q=Teatro+Pregones+NEA+Master+Artist&ie=UTF-8&oe=UTF-8 In 2011 Teatro Pregones, Bronx NY presented Papo Vazquez an NEA Master Artist award.]
